name: Claim denied because no doctor day of fall, options?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied because no doctor day of fall, options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days (UT); prove prompt care intent.
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal showing treatment sought promptly; UT accepts ER visits later. Medical records retroactively link[2]. Key factors: 20-day objection window. Doctor affidavit helps. 70% appeals win.

description: Appeal within 20 days (UT); prove prompt care intent.
